message:
🐛 Fix GitHub stats dropdown showing zeros for rate-limited visitors (#1304)

Use actual kubestellar/console stats as fallback defaults instead of
"0". GitHub's unauthenticated API rate limit (60 req/hr) causes most
visitors to see zeros because the client-side fetch fails silently.

Closes #1300

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
